Task or Decision: Confirm the interim Treasurer arrangement, including authority, expected time period, and support needed.
Supporting People: Finance Committee; Interim Treasurer; Nominating Committee if needed
Notes: Confirm authority and support before assigning longer-term work.

Task or Decision: Identify weekly must-do financial tasks: deposits, bills, payroll coordination, reimbursements, reports, and account review.
Supporting People: Pastor; Bookkeeper or administrative support if assigned
Notes: Use this to protect continuity during the transition.

Task or Decision: Confirm access to current records and systems without storing passwords or sensitive information in shared documents.
Supporting People: Pastor; current system administrators
Notes: Do not place passwords, bank numbers, donor records, or payroll details in this tracker.

Task or Decision: Assign owners for Personnel Committee hiring tasks and Finance Committee financial-control tasks.
Supporting People: Finance Chair; Personnel Chair; Deacons
Notes: Owner assignments can be updated after committee discussion.

Task or Decision: Confirm the official June 28, 2026 minutes for the paid, part-time Bookkeeper motion.
Supporting People: Pastor; Deacons; Personnel Committee; Nominating Committee; Finance Committee
Notes: Decision log now records the motion summary: Personnel and Nominating work together to add the position; Personnel may hire the right candidate; Finance adjusts the budget; compensation not to exceed $150 per week.

Task or Decision: Determine how long the interim Treasurer arrangement should continue.
Supporting People: Interim Treasurer; Finance Committee; Nominating Committee if needed
Notes: Tie this to transition coverage and bylaw requirements.

Task or Decision: Begin a monthly Finance Committee review rhythm.
Supporting People: Treasurer / Interim Treasurer; Pastor; Bookkeeper if assigned
Notes: Use the monthly review checklist as a starting point.

Task or Decision: Keep a decision log and open questions list so unresolved issues do not get lost.
Supporting People: Finance Committee; Personnel Committee; Pastor; Deacons
Notes: Initial setup due July 13; update after each meeting.

Task or Decision: Prepare a short church update when leadership is ready.
Supporting People: Finance Committee; Personnel Committee; Cory Davis
Notes: Use the congregational summary and slide deck only after leadership review.

Task or Decision: Finalize the paid Bookkeeper / Financial Administrator job description.
Supporting People: Finance Committee; Pastor; Deacons
Notes: The role has already been authorized by congregational vote; Finance input is needed before final job description and hiring materials are used.

Task or Decision: Confirm employment classification, expected hours, and compensation details for the authorized paid role.
Supporting People: Finance Committee; Pastor; Deacons; Nominating Committee as needed
Notes: Confirm that compensation and hours stay within the June 28 authorization: not to exceed $150 per week, described as $18.75 per hour for approximately 8 hours.

Task or Decision: Define the title, qualifications, application process, interview process, references, background-check process, and candidate evaluation process for the role.
Supporting People: Finance Committee for financial duties; Pastor for supervision context
Notes: Do not use final application, interview, reference-check, or candidate evaluation materials before Personnel review.

Task or Decision: Decide who should supervise and evaluate the Bookkeeper / Financial Administrator role.
Supporting People: Pastor; Finance Committee; Deacons if needed
Notes: Clarify day-to-day supervision separately from financial controls.

Task or Decision: Approve or recommend the final role details for the authorized paid Bookkeeper / Financial Administrator role.
Supporting People: Finance Committee; Nominating Committee as needed; Deacons; church approval if outside prior authorization
Notes: Requires Finance budget impact review before posting the role, beginning interviews, making an offer, or final hiring.

Task or Decision: Decide which duties should remain with the elected Treasurer.
Supporting People: Nominating Committee; Personnel Committee; Pastor; Deacons
Notes: Must be checked against bylaws before final adoption.

Task or Decision: Decide which duties should be assigned to the authorized Bookkeeper / Financial Administrator role.
Supporting People: Personnel Committee; Treasurer / Interim Treasurer
Notes: Finance defines duties, controls, access, and reporting requirements before hiring materials are finalized.

Task or Decision: Define the monthly review packet required for Finance Committee review.
Supporting People: Treasurer / Interim Treasurer; Bookkeeper if assigned
Notes: Should include budget vs actuals, reconciliations, designated funds, reimbursements, card activity, and exceptions.

Task or Decision: Approve software requirements before demos or purchase.
Supporting People: Treasurer; Bookkeeper if assigned; Pastor/admin users; Personnel for staffing impact
Notes: Do not choose software before requirements are clear.

Task or Decision: Draft reimbursement, spending authority, and card/payment controls.
Supporting People: Treasurer; Pastor; Deacons as appropriate
Notes: Thresholds and church vote triggers need bylaw and practice review.

Task or Decision: Estimate budget impact for software, authorized bookkeeping support, payroll/accounting vendor support, audit/review, or related costs.
Supporting People: Personnel Committee; Deacons; Pastor
Notes: The June 28 motion assigned Finance Committee responsibility for adjusting the budget to fund the Bookkeeper need; identify which other costs exceed authorization or require church approval.

Task or Decision: Recommend an audit or financial review process.
Supporting People: CPA/accounting advisor if used; Treasurer; Deacons
Notes: Professional review may be needed before finalizing scope.

Task or Decision: Confirm what the bylaws require for Treasurer election, replacement, or role changes.
Supporting People: Deacons; Church Clerk; Finance Committee
Notes: Do this before recommending changes to officer responsibilities.

Task or Decision: Identify which items need Deacon review before being brought to the church.
Supporting People: Finance Committee; Personnel Committee
Notes: Use this to keep the approval path orderly.

Task or Decision: Identify which remaining items still need a church vote.
Supporting People: Finance Committee; Personnel Committee; Nominating Committee; Church Clerk
Notes: The paid Bookkeeper hiring authority has already been granted within the June 28 limits; remaining votes may relate to bylaws, budget changes beyond authorization, policy, or contract commitments.

Task or Decision: Decide how and when the congregation should receive updates.
Supporting People: Finance Committee; Personnel Committee; Cory Davis
Notes: Use calm, plain-language updates after leadership alignment.

Task or Decision: Review the Treasurer vs. authorized Bookkeeper distinction.
Supporting People: Pastor; Deacons; Nominating Committee
Notes: This is a core alignment item before posting the role or interviewing candidates.

Task or Decision: Review committee responsibility boundaries.
Supporting People: Finance Committee; Personnel Committee; Nominating Committee
Notes: Keep Personnel out of financial controls and Finance out of the personnel process.

Task or Decision: Identify bylaw, Deacon, Nominating Committee, or church vote questions.
Supporting People: Church Clerk; Finance Committee; Personnel Committee; Nominating Committee
Notes: Carry unresolved items into the open questions list.

Task or Decision: Review reimbursement and spending thresholds.
Supporting People: Treasurer; Pastor; Deacons
Notes: Thresholds should be tested against bylaws, budget practice, and church vote expectations.

Task or Decision: Decide card/payment direction.
Supporting People: Treasurer; Pastor; ministry leaders; Personnel for accountability impact
Notes: Decide whether to continue debit cards, use assigned credit cards, controlled cards, or another method.

Task or Decision: Finalize Bookkeeper role materials after Finance Committee input.
Supporting People: Finance Committee; Pastor
Notes: Finalize job description, application, hiring process, interview guide, reference questions, and candidate rubric after Finance confirms duties and controls.

Task or Decision: Prepare any needed business meeting summary or motion.
Supporting People: Finance Committee; Personnel Committee; Nominating Committee if needed
Notes: Only prepare motions after approval path is confirmed.

Task or Decision: Use the monthly Finance Committee checklist.
Supporting People: Treasurer / Interim Treasurer; Bookkeeper if assigned
Notes: This should become a regular monthly rhythm.

Task or Decision: Implement approved reimbursement and monthly review processes.
Supporting People: Treasurer; Bookkeeper if assigned; ministry leaders
Notes: Implementation depends on approved thresholds and review steps.

Task or Decision: Plan software implementation if software is approved.
Supporting People: Treasurer; Bookkeeper if assigned; Pastor/admin users
Notes: Do not implement until software direction and budget authority are clear.

Task or Decision: Launch or continue the authorized Bookkeeper / Financial Administrator hiring process.
Supporting People: Finance Committee; Pastor; Deacons
Notes: Depends on final job description, application, hiring process, compensation details, and documented Finance Committee input.

Task or Decision: Confirm approval path for election or confirmation of a Treasurer / Financial Officer.
Supporting People: Deacons; Church Clerk; Finance Committee
Notes: Only bring to church if required by bylaws or church practice.

Task or Decision: Confirm whether the official minutes match the recorded June 28 Bookkeeper motion summary.
Supporting People: Personnel Committee; Nominating Committee; Finance Committee; Pastor; Deacons
Notes: Recorded summary: not to exceed $150 per week; Personnel and Nominating work together to add the position; Personnel may hire the right candidate; Finance adjusts the budget.

Task or Decision: Confirm whether Bookkeeper compensation, hours, or budget impact remain within the June 28 authorization.
Supporting People: Finance Committee; Nominating Committee as needed; Deacons; Church Clerk
Notes: Additional church approval may be needed only if the recommendation exceeds $150 per week or another part of the motion.

Task or Decision: Confirm approval path for budget changes beyond the authorized bookkeeping support, including software, payroll/accounting vendor support, audit/review, or related costs.
Supporting People: Personnel Committee; Deacons; Pastor
Notes: May need church vote depending on budget rules and amount.

Task or Decision: Confirm approval path for software contracts or recurring commitments above approved thresholds.
Supporting People: Pastor; Deacons; Church Clerk
Notes: Review contract length, recurring cost, and budget authority.

Task or Decision: Confirm approval path for changes to spending authority that affect church approval rights.
Supporting People: Pastor; Deacons; Church Clerk
Notes: Do not reduce congregational approval rights without bylaw and church practice review.

Task or Decision: Confirm approval path for reimbursement, card/payment, or financial policy changes requiring congregational approval.
Supporting People: Pastor; Deacons; Church Clerk
Notes: Some policies may be committee-level; others may need church action.

Task or Decision: Confirm approval path for major purchases, debt, or long-term financial commitments.
Supporting People: Pastor; Church Clerk; Congregation if required
Notes: This is a safeguard item, not a current recommendation.

Task or Decision: Confirm approval path for any change to officer duties controlled by the bylaws.
Supporting People: Nominating Committee; Church Clerk; Finance Committee
Notes: Bylaw-controlled officer changes should not be treated as committee-only decisions.
